statement: In every magma, Equation 2017 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (y * w)`) implies Equation 2729 (`x = ((y * x) * (z * w)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0881
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op y w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op z w)) y)
